TSLA: Tesla wins first European approval for FSD supervised (TSLA:NASDAQ). Tesla has received its first European approval for its Full Self-Driving (FSD) supervised software in the Netherlands. This approval allows the use of FSD with mandatory human supervision on both highways and city streets, a significant step for Tesla's expansion of the technology within the European Union.

Tesla Bars Customers From Selling Model S, X 'Signature' Edition Within One Year - Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA). Tesla has implemented a clause in its purchase agreement for Model S and Model X 'Signature' edition customers, prohibiting them from selling their vehicles within one year of delivery due to the limited release nature. If unforeseen circumstances necessitate a sale, Tesla reserves the right to repurchase the vehicle at a depreciated price. Additionally, the article notes poor momentum and value for TSLA according to Benzinga Edge Rankings, despite a recent surge in after-hours trading.

How Graniteshares 1.25x Long Tsla Daily Etf (TSL) Affects Rotational Strategy Timing. Q4 Earnings Highlights: Autoliv (NYSE:ALV) Vs The Rest Of The Automobile Manufacturing Stocks. Autoliv (NYSE:ALV) reported Q4 revenues of $2.82 billion, beating analyst expectations, but the stock is down 12.8% since. The article analyzes Autoliv's performance against other automobile manufacturing companies like Rivian, Lucid, Winnebago, and Tesla, and discusses trends in the sector such as the impact of EVs and geopolitical risks on the market. Overall, the automobile manufacturing sector saw mixed Q4 results, with revenues beating estimates by 3.8% but share prices declining by an average of 13.6% post-earnings.

Weekend Tech Roundup: Pony AI's Upgrade, Tesla's Sales Dip, Waymo's Pothole Fix, Kia's Atlas Robot And GM. This weekend tech roundup covers several significant developments: Pony AI introduced an AI upgrade and expanded its robotaxi services, while Tesla experienced a 16.2% dip in China retail sales in Q1. Waymo partnered with Waze to help cities identify and fix potholes, and Kia announced plans to deploy Boston Dynamics' Atlas robot at its Georgia manufacturing plant. Additionally, General Motors initiated a recall of 271,000 Chevrolet Malibu vehicles due to a rearview camera issue.

‘Stay on the Sidelines,’ Says Top Investor About Tesla Stock. Tesla's recent performance has led top investor Daniel Sparks to advise staying on the sidelines regarding its stock. The company experienced a year-over-year decrease in sales for 2025 and a sequential drop in Q1 2026 deliveries and energy business. While Tesla is focusing on future AI initiatives, these ambitious projects will require significant capital, which could be challenged by weak performance in its core automotive and energy sectors.

Amazon, Meta, Levi Strauss And More: 5 Stocks Investors Couldn't Stop Buzzing About This Week. This article highlights five stocks that garnered significant retail investor attention during the week of April 6-10: Amazon, Meta Platforms, Levi Strauss, Palantir Technologies, and Tesla. These companies were buzzed about due to factors such as AI developments, earnings reports, corporate news, and investor sentiment, with each company experiencing varying stock performance and analyst perspectives.

Barclays Bank PLC (ATMP) launches contingent‑coupon notes tied to NFLX, PLTR, TSLA. Barclays Bank PLC has launched contingent-coupon notes (ATMP) linked to the performance of Netflix (NFLX), Palantir (PLTR), and Tesla (TSLA) stocks. These notes offer a monthly contingent coupon of $7.083 per $1,000 (8.50% annualized) if the closing value of each underlying stock is at or above 75% of its initial value on observation dates. The notes also feature an automatic redemption mechanism where principal plus the contingent coupon is paid if all underlying stocks are at or above their initial value on observation dates, starting from the twelfth observation date.

Roundhill TSLA WeeklyPay ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.1984. The Roundhill TSLA WeeklyPay ETF (NYSE Arca: TSLA) has announced a weekly distribution of $0.1984 per share. Shareowners as of April 15, 2024, will receive this distribution on or about April 22, 2024. This payment reflects the ETF's strategy to provide investors with weekly income.

Ross Gerber Demands $10K Refund If Tesla's New FSD Doesn't Work 'Unsupervised'—Says Google Has 'Solved' Autonomy With Waymo. Investor Ross Gerber stated that Tesla Inc. should refund customers $10,000 if its new Full Self-Driving (FSD) v14.3 update doesn't work unsupervised, expressing that customers have waited long enough. He also praised Google's Waymo, claiming it has "solved" autonomy and drives better than humans. Meanwhile, Elon Musk continues to defend FSD, and the NHTSA's investigation into the system is ongoing.

Tesla's self-driving software gets Dutch go-ahead, in boost for EU ambitions. Tesla's driver assistance software, which handles most driving tasks on highways and city streets under human supervision, has received regulatory approval from the Dutch vehicle authority, marking its first approval in Europe. This decision could facilitate the software's acceptance by other European authorities. The full self-driving software is already available in the U.S.

Morgan Stanley Has Mostly Positive Outlook On Tesla FSD V15. Morgan Stanley released a research note on Tesla's Full Self-Driving (FSD) Version 15, expressing a mostly positive outlook despite some caveats. The firm believes the upcoming FSD V15, with expanded model parameters and improved data collection, will be crucial for unlocking unsupervised autonomy and supporting the stock's valuation, especially as Tesla approaches 10 billion FSD miles. While acknowledging a slower-than-expected Robotaxi rollout, Morgan Stanley remains optimistic that Tesla will demonstrate progress in scaling unsupervised autonomous driving capabilities throughout 2026.
TGT: Cash nearly tripled to $20M as Mama's Creations adds Walmart, Target wins. Mama's Creations (NASDAQ: MAMA) reported strong financial results for fiscal year 2026, with revenue up 39% to $171.7 million and Adjusted EBITDA increasing by over 50%. The company's cash position nearly tripled to $20.0 million, driven by improved profitability and operating cash flow. Key achievements included the successful integration of its Bay Shore facility and significant new retail placements with Walmart, Target, and Costco.

Spirepoint Private Client LLC Raises Holdings in Walmart Inc. $WMT. Spirepoint Private Client LLC increased its stake in Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ:WMT) by 10.9% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total ownership to 102,822 shares valued at $11.455 million. This makes Walmart the 25th largest holding for Spirepoint, reflecting institutional investor confidence. Other major institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp also significantly increased their holdings in Walmart, which currently has an average "Buy" rating from analysts and a consensus price target of $137.12.

Triad Wealth Partners LLC Has $4.50 Million Stock Position in Walmart Inc. $WMT. Triad Wealth Partners LLC significantly increased its stake in Walmart Inc. by 131.9% in the fourth quarter, now holding 40,375 shares valued at approximately $4.50 million. This move comes despite recent insider selling by Walmart executives, including C. Douglas McMillon and John D. Rainey, totaling over $33 million. Analysts generally maintain a "Buy" rating for WMT with a consensus price target of $137.12, supported by positive sentiment surrounding the company's strategic growth levers like AI, advertising, and membership initiatives.

Dollar Tree Inc. stock underperforms Tuesday when compared to competitors. Dollar Tree Inc. (DLTR) shares fell on Tuesday despite a positive day for the broader stock market, underperforming its competitors. The stock closed at $121.72, a 1.25% decrease for the day, while its rivals, including Walmart and Target, saw gains.

OFI Invest Asset Management Lowers Holdings in Walmart Inc. $WMT. OFI Invest Asset Management reduced its stake in Walmart (WMT) by 24.3% in Q4, selling 135,893 shares but still holding 423,594 shares valued at $47.19 million. This move comes amidst insider selling by Walmart executives, though analyst sentiment remains largely positive with an average "Buy" rating and a target price of $137.12. Other institutional investors, such as AQR Capital Management and Vanguard Group Inc., have significantly increased their positions in the company.

Walmart Inc. $WMT Shares Acquired by Jackson Square Capital LLC. Jackson Square Capital LLC significantly increased its stake in Walmart Inc. (WMT) by 287.7% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 11,397 shares. Other major institutions like AQR, Amundi, and Vanguard also boosted their positions, indicating growing institutional confidence in WMT. Analysts currently maintain a "Buy" rating for Walmart, with an average price target of $137.12, driven by strategic initiatives in AI, advertising revenue, and EV charging rollouts.

Cantor Fitzgerald Investment Advisors L.P. Sells 17,553 Shares of Kimberly-Clark Corporation $KMB. Cantor Fitzgerald Investment Advisors L.P. reduced its stake in Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ:KMB) by 16.1%, selling 17,553 shares and retaining 91,721 shares valued at approximately $9.25 million. Institutional investors collectively own 76.29% of the company. Recent analytical reports indicate a consensus "Hold" rating for Kimberly-Clark with an average target price of $115.07, despite concerns about recent California facility fires affecting supply chains.

Target Honors J.B. Hunt as Domestic Carrier of the Year. Target Corp. recognized J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc. with its 2006 Domestic Carrier of the Year award. J.B. Hunt was lauded for its assistance with peak season planning, surge capacity, and multi-modal transportation execution on a national scale. Additionally, several J.B. Hunt employees received Target All-Star awards for their exceptional customer service and tactical excellence.
SBUX: Starbucks Is Selling a New Protein-Packed Breakfast Item. Starbucks has launched a new protein-packed breakfast option nationwide: MUSH Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Overnight Oats. This ready-to-eat item, which was a 2025 Good Housekeeping Snack Award winner, offers 15 grams of protein and up to 7 grams of fiber. A dietitian praised the new offering for being a nutritious, convenient, and gluten-free breakfast solution for busy mornings.

Starbucks' Prudent Brand Investment Is Luring Consumers, but Near-Term Costs Are Hefty. Starbucks is undergoing a strategic pivot to address its competitive restaurant landscape, focusing on customer experience, atmosphere, service efficiency, advertising, and product innovation. These efforts aim to restore brand strength and revive comparable sales growth, with Morningstar analysts anticipating a return to positive comparable sales in fiscal 2026 after two years of declines in North America. While these investments are deemed prudent, the near-term costs are significant.

SBUX Forecast, Price Target & Analyst Ratings | STARBUCKS CORP (NASDAQ:SBUX). This article provides an in-depth analyst forecast for Starbucks Corp (NASDAQ: SBUX), detailing price targets, earnings estimates, and revenue projections. Based on 48 analyst forecasts, the average price target is $101.78, indicating a potential 2.98% upside. Starbucks is expected to report Q2 2026 earnings on April 20, 2026, with an EPS estimate of $0.42 and revenue of $9.269 billion.
DIS: Wave of Layoffs Back, The Walt Disney Company Cuts 1,000 Employees. The Walt Disney Company is set to lay off up to 1,000 employees as part of its ongoing cost-cutting measures, primarily impacting the marketing division. This restructuring follows the appointment of Josh D'Amaro as CEO and a recent consolidation of marketing functions under a single leadership. The move aims to strengthen Disney's financial position, building on previous efficiency programs, including 7,000 layoffs in 2023.

The Walt Disney Company (DIS): Balancing Near-Term Pressures with Long-Term Growth Drivers. BofA Securities analyst Jessica Reif Ehrlich reiterated a Buy rating and $125 price target on The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS), highlighting the strength of its Experiences segment despite near-term headwinds like weak international attendance and cruise ship pre-opening costs. Ehrlich projects approximately 5% revenue growth for the Experiences segment in Q2 FY2026 and believes rising oil prices will not significantly impact earnings due to Disney's hedging and fuel-efficient fleet. The Sports segment's operating income is expected to be back-half weighted in FY2026, primarily due to the new NBA media rights deal's payout structure.

Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Lowers Stake in The Walt Disney Company $DIS. Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 2.8% in the fourth quarter, selling 134,481 shares but still holding 4,695,338 shares valued at over $534 million. While some institutional investors increased their positions, other market signals for Disney are mixed, with positive news like park reopenings contrasted by reports of job cuts and industry consolidation. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Disney with a target price of $132.19.

The Walt Disney Company $DIS Shares Purchased by Factory Mutual Insurance Co.. Bfsg LLC Cuts Position in The Walt Disney Company $DIS. Bfsg LLC significantly reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 96.3% in Q4, selling 69,243 shares and retaining only 2,684 shares valued at $305,000. WINNIE THE POOH'S 100TH YEAR The Walt Disney Company is celebrating 100 years of Winnie the Pooh with a free interactive London exhibition, “Winnie the Pooh: The Lost Balloon,” inspired by Ashdown Forest and featuring immersive activities for visitor. The Walt Disney Company is commemorating 100 years of Winnie the Pooh with a free interactive exhibition in London. Titled “Winnie the Pooh: The Lost Balloon,” the event is inspired by Ashdown Forest and offers immersive activities for visitors. The exhibition celebrates the beloved character's centennial milestone.

NIKE (NKE) director John Rogers Jr. adds 4,000 Class B shares. NIKE, Inc. director John W.
